title: Solving a First Order Linear Recurrence Relation
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process for finding a closed-form solution to a first order linear recurrence relation of the form aₙ = c * aₙ₋₁ + f(n).
elements: Initial Recurrence Relation aₙ = c * aₙ₋₁ + f(n)
relationships: Process flow starting from initial relation, moving to homogeneous solution, then particular solution, combining for general solution, applying initial condition to solve for constant, resulting in final solution
